headline: Ralph's autonomous burndown loop shipped a fast run of fleet-hardening work on top of the design-system drop (#42): the launch gate is now armed (SITE_LIVE backported to all 4 previously-unprotected apps #50, the acceptance realData check runs automatically on production builds #78, root `pnpm test` wired into CI #51), a bugfix batch landed (duplicate sectionOrder ids + weak phone validation #89, unreadable junk-removal hero contrast #79, the 3 preview apps' latent gallery/sectionOrder bug #52, scaffold perf defaults #81), new user-facing surface shipped (branded /thanks page + default form redirect #80, machine-parseable JSON-LD hours + robots.txt + OG completeness #83, a11y baseline — focus ring, skip link, reduced-motion hero video #82, Lighthouse ≥95 + axe=100 CI budgets #88), the visual-regression fleet-drift tripwire re-landed on current main (#74, supersedes stale PR #3), and vitest coverage was added for the schema contract (#53) and new-client/eject-client tooling (#54). All 7 apps build clean. Engine still frozen pending ops cutover (#10). Pre-revenue — no paying client yet.
next: Work the open needs-human backlog: trust/conversion fields (#87), per-vertical content packs (#85), analytics/conversion events (#84), aesthetics dials (#86)
Set real form.accessKey (Web3Forms) + hcaptchaSiteKey before any prospect outreach
Delete the frozen packages/agent engine once ops's first live generate passes (#10)
blocked: Autonomous site generation blocked on ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (in ops)
Engine delete (#10) waits on ops's first live generate
